title: bricks of magic
description: this mod adds the magic of bricks? check out the description for more info.
body:
## what does this mod add

<details>
<summary>!spoiler!</summary>

this mod adds a structure with a boss called the brick lord, when you slay the boss you will get a special sword with the ability to strike lightings around you! oh yes and it adds a nice painting!

<details>
<summary>pictures:</summary>

![the structure and the sword in the middle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e936ea7002f8c02ba101c022af04d5c2007f175.png)
![the painting:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bda180479200f45f06c104ba154dd8708ee05285.png)
</details>


</details>

### dev note:

i just wanna say that the mod is still in beta things like the name the file of the mod and the picture might change!
